codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for the three enriched existing surfaces. The implementation adds a typed `src/content/enriched-surfaces.ts` module, wires new BetterCard-backed enrichment blocks into `ArchitectureSurface`, `TokenomicsSurface`, and `ProofSurface`, and renders the requested Rust/BRAID, arbitrage tax-routing/TRUTH-PERP, and gas-sponsored/UDA/one-click copy-trading content with `MaturityBadge` and `EvidenceHook` treatment. `BetterCard` wraps the shadcn `Card` primitive, so the enrichment blocks satisfy the card requirement, and I did not find any blocking correctness, coverage, or regression issues against the feature description or VAL-CONTENT-014 through VAL-CONTENT-016.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The content-strategy workflow still assumes a clean baseline and does not document what to do when a small pre-existing validator failure must be repaired in order to leave the assigned feature validator-clean. This feature had to deviate for that reason, so the worker skill/base procedure should explicitly allow that narrow exception.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/test/vision/.factory/skills/content-strategy-worker/SKILL.md:22,32-33 requires failing tests first plus the full validator/browser sequence; /Users/test/.factory/missions/33dae310-26cf-4368-9488-64b235b6db83/handoffs/2026-03-24T04-18-26-763Z__content-enrich-existing-surfaces__75593119-7399-4bca-bf14-fc731d7b020d.json:89-98 records `followedProcedure=false` because the worker repaired a pre-existing dark-token contract failure instead of immediately returning; /Users/test/vision/.factory/library/environment.md:26 already documents that `.factory/init.sh` can overwrite tracked shadcn primitives.

summary: Pass. The reviewed implementation satisfies the requested enrichments on Architecture, Tokenomics, and Proof, including badge/evidence/card treatment, and I found no blocking issues.
